_generator.name: Hand-authored ARM template matching deploy/main.bicep. Regenerate via `az bicep build` and diff before committing.

metadata.comments: XdrLogRaider v0.1.0-beta — connector + Sentinel Solution. Requires an existing Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace (any RG, any subscription in the same tenant). Adds 47 custom tables (45 data + Heartbeat + AuthTestResult) + a Sentinel Solution package (XdrLogRaider) + a GenericUI Data Connector card visible in Sentinel → Data Connectors blade, all via cross-RG nested deployments.

metadata.description: Region for connector resources (FA, KV, Storage, App Insights). Can differ from workspace region.
REQUIRED: full ARM resource ID of the existing Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace. Can be in any RG or subscription in the same tenant.
REQUIRED: region where the existing workspace lives. DCE + DCR MUST be in this region (Azure Monitor regional constraint).
UPN of the dedicated read-only Entra service account.
Authentication method for the Defender XDR portal.
Function App plan SKU. Y1 = Consumption.

Pinned release tag, e.g. '0.1.0-beta'. URL becomes releases/download/v<value>/function-app.zip. DO NOT use 'latest' for pre-release tags — GitHub's /releases/latest endpoint excludes pre-releases and returns 302→nothing, leaving the Function App with no code.
GitHub owner/repo hosting the Function App ZIP release.

Deploy Sentinel content (parsers, hunting queries, analytic rules, workbooks). Set false to deploy connector resources only — useful when re-deploying or when workspace permissions don't allow Sentinel writes. Custom tables + Data Connector card are still deployed.

Optional. Service account password (for credentials_totp method). When provided, ARM writes it to Key Vault as 'mde-portal-password'. Leave blank to upload via Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 post-deploy.
Optional. TOTP Base32 seed (for credentials_totp method). When provided, ARM writes it to Key Vault as 'mde-portal-totp'. Leave blank to upload via the post-deploy script.
Optional. Passkey JSON (for passkey method). When provided, ARM writes it to Key Vault as 'mde-portal-passkey'. Leave blank to upload via the post-deploy script.

properties.description: Microsoft Sentinel custom connector ingesting Defender XDR portal-only telemetry — 45 streams across 7 tiers (configuration, compliance, drift, exposure, governance, identity/MDI, audit, metadata). Includes 47 custom tables, 6 KQL parsers, 14 analytic rules (ship disabled per best practice), 9 hunting queries, 6 workbooks. PowerShell 7.4 Function App authenticates to security.microsoft.com via Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey. Source: https://github.com/akefallonitis/xdrlograider
properties.descriptionHtml:
Microsoft Sentinel custom connector ingesting Defender XDR portal-only telemetry — 45 streams across 7 tiers (configuration, compliance, drift, exposure, governance, identity/MDI, audit, metadata).

Includes 47 custom tables, 6 KQL parsers, 14 analytic rules (ship disabled per best practice), 9 hunting queries, 6 workbooks. PowerShell 7.4 Function App authenticates to security.microsoft.com via Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey.

Source: github.com/akefallonitis/xdrlograider
properties.author: [variables('solutionAuthor')]

connectorUiConfig.title: XdrLogRaider — Defender XDR portal telemetry
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
Ingests Defender XDR portal-only telemetry — 45 streams of configuration, compliance, drift, exposure, governance, identity (MDI), audit, metadata that is **not** exposed by public Microsoft Graph Security / Defender XDR / MDE APIs.

- 47 custom tables (45 data + Heartbeat + AuthTestResult)
- 6 KQL parsers (drift via `hash(RawJson)`)
- 14 analytic rules (ship disabled per best practice)
- 9 hunting queries
- 6 workbooks

Powered by an unattended PowerShell Azure Function App authenticating to `security.microsoft.com` via Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey.

graphQueries.baseQuery: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

sampleQueries.query: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 10

sampleQueries.description: Suppression rules modified in the last 24h
sampleQueries.query: MDE_SuppressionRules_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | project TimeGenerated, EntityId, RawJson

value: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated) | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(1h)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions on the workspace are required

customs.name: Service account
customs.description: Dedicated read-only Entra service account (Security Reader + MDE Analyst) with Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey configured.

instructionSteps.title: Upload auth secrets to Key Vault
instructionSteps.description: Either provide them via the deploy wizard (Authentication step → Upload via wizard) **or** run the helper script after deploy:

instructionSteps.title: Wait for self-test
instructionSteps.description: Within 5 minutes the Function App validates auth and writes to MDE_AuthTestResult_CL:

parameters.label: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 1 | project TimeGenerated, Success, Stage, FailureReason

postDeployCommand.value: [if(or(and(equals(parameters('authMethod'), 'credentials_totp'), and(greater(length(parameters('servicePassword')), 0), greater(length(parameters('totpSeed')), 0))), and(equals(parameters('authMethod'), 'passkey'), greater(length(parameters('passkeyJson')), 0))), concat('Auth secrets uploaded by deploy. Self-test result expected within 5 minutes in workspace: MDE_AuthTestResult_CL | top 1 by TimeGenerated. KV: ', variables('kvName')), concat('git clone https://github.com/', parameters('githubRepo'), ' && cd xdrlograider && ./tools/Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 -KeyVaultName ', variables('kvName')))]
